articles.headline: Fantasy Goal Assist? Why Bruno Fernandes didn't equal Premier League record against Liverpool
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes was given FPL points for his "assist" against Liverpool. So why hasn't he equalled the record?

articles.headline: Man United win over Liverpool seals Champions League return
articles.description: Kobbie Mainoo's winning goal secured Manchester United's return to the Champions League and left rivals Liverpool facing a nervy end to the season.

articles.headline: Michael Carrick on Man United's Champions League return: 'Feels natural'
articles.description: Michael Carrick said it "feels natural" to be Manchester United manager after guiding the club to Champions League qualification with victory over Liverpool.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Malen monitored by Chelsea, Man United
articles.description: Chelsea and Manchester United are among the clubs eyeing Aston Villa's Donyell Malen. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Sir Alex Ferguson left Man United vs. Liverpool after receiving medical attention - sources
articles.description: Sir Alex Ferguson left Old Trafford ahead of Manchester United's Premier League clash with Liverpool on Sunday after feeling unwell, sources told ESPN.

articles.headline: Carrick in 'pole position' as Man Utd boss passes another key audition
articles.description: Gary Neville believes Michael Carrick has put himself in pole position to become the next Man Utd manager after earning Champions League qualification with a 3-2 win over Liverpool.

articles.headline: Carrick: Return to Champions League a huge step for Man United
articles.description: Michael Carrick speaks after Man United's win over Liverpool confirmed their Champions League spot for next season.

articles.headline: Slot blames Liverpool loss to Man United on 'pattern' of bad calls
articles.description: Arne Slot said there is a "complete pattern" of decisions going against his Liverpool team this season after Manchester United inflicted a 3-2 defeat at OId Trafford with a handball on Benjamin Sesko's goal being overlooked by match officials.

articles.headline: Nicol: Appointing Carrick permanently still a tough call for Man United
articles.description: Steve Nicol believes that questions remain over Michael Carrick's experience, despite progress as Manchester United F.C. interim manager.

articles.headline: Nicol: Liverpool defensively are a shambles
articles.description: Steve Nicol slams Liverpool's defensive display after their 3-2 defeat to Man United.

articles.headline: Man United hold off Liverpool fightback to qualify for Champions League
articles.description: Homegrown Manchester United star Kobbie Mainoo sealed a helter-skelter 3-2 victory against archrivals Liverpool, earning them Champions League qualification.

articles.headline: Slot: VAR decisions have gone against Liverpool all season
articles.description: Arne Slot hits out at VAR after Liverpool's 3-2 defeat against Manchester United in the Premier League.

articles.headline: How Mainoo seized centre stage after exile under 'nightmare' Amorim
articles.description: Kobbie Mainoo emphatically underlined his revival under Michael Carrick by slotting in Man Utd's winning goal against Liverpool on Sunday.

articles.headline: Could Bruno Fernandes break long-standing Premier League assist record?
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes is on the verge of equalling the record for the most assists registered in a single Premier League season.

articles.headline: The earliest dates Arsenal or Man City could win the Premier League title
articles.description: The Premier League title race between Manchester City and Arsenal is set to go right down to the wire. But when could either side win it earliest?

articles.headline: What must happen for Man United to secure Champions League spot?

articles.headline: Five times Arsenal have let the Premier League title slip away
articles.description: Arsenal's quest for their first Premier League title since the Invincibles' famous triumph in 2003-04 has recently threatened to veer of course.

articles.headline: Arsenal and Man City's remaining Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
articles.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.

articles.headline: Gyökeres' double lifts Gunners to vital win in title race
articles.description: Viktor Gyökeres and Bukayo Saka star for Arsenal in a 3-0 demolition of Fulham to maintain the Gunners' lead at the top of the EPL table.

articles.headline: Michael Carrick: Amad Diallo has given Man United 'awful lot' despite goal, assist drought

articles.headline: Mikel Arteta: Myles Lewis-Skelly was incredible in midfield vs. Fulham
articles.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has praised Myles Lewis-Skelly's performance in their 3-0 victory against Fulham.

articles.headline: Saka shows why Arsenal need him for Premier League, Champions League push
articles.description: Bukayo Saka's first start in over a month was a welcome sight and he responded in kind, leading Arsenal to a 3-0 win over Fulham with an energy that could yet help them win the Premier League this season.

articles.headline: Mikel Arteta: In-form Bukayo Saka gives Arsenal trophy momentum
articles.description: Mikel Arteta said Bukayo Saka has returned to his best form at a crucial moment and claimed momentum is with Arsenal as they target glory at home and abroad.

articles.description: Myles Lewis-Skelly has said Arsenal have "three finals left" as they maintain their push for a first Premier League title since 2004.

articles.description: ESPN FC's Shaka Hislop has praised Bukayo Saka's performance in Arsenal's 3-0 victory over Fulham in the Premier League.
